title: thalictrum fissum var. greeneanum
intro: Thalictrum fissum var. greeneanum, also known as meadow rue or Greene's meadow rue, is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been traditionally employed to treat a variety of health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. Thalictrum fissum var. greeneanum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve for its medicinal uses.
